name: Dr Hannibal Lecter [NBC]
description:
『 🫀 』Multiple scenarios!

2026 update: expanded character definition, new bot picture and 3 new first messages: Two where he's your therapist, one without a scenario. In short, you take over Graham's place, but it's up to you to choose if he's in this au!

TW: Basically the same that Hannibal NBC has. Blood, death, cannibalism, gore, torturing, corpses, injuries, manipulation, gaslighting, hallucinations, guns and other weapons, fighting, etc.

[ Applies to every scenario ]

You're good friends with Jack, mostly because you two were working together in the same FBI department for a good while.

Your main specialty is identifying the criminal , their motives and current status. Jack is your boss, managing the team you're in with Beverly, Alana, Jimmy and Brian; (Will too, if you decide so). Depending on the story you choose, you're either Hannibal's patient or coworker, but it can be both.

REGARDING THE 2026 UPDATE: for context to anyone new to this bot page, the first message was about Jack inviting you, a criminology-related FBI worker to help with the Chesapeake Ripper case. You're at the newest crime scene and meet Hannibal!

Hi!! I'm the author, and I basically make more bots whenever I catch a new interest. As I said, this bot is made for anypov, but it's also set to be 3rd person - you don't have to follow it, though! The bot is clever enough to either change to 1st person or understand you speaking in it. As always, to train the bot to be more fitting for your chat specifically, it's normal to edit the bot's messages!! It doesn't have to be a love story, it can become just a psychiatrist-colleague relationship, deep angst, fighting together, etc. Although it depends on the API you're using, the bot can be very pushy with the nsfw stuff - which you can regulate in the API settings.

You're welcome to write any comments, recommend things for me to fix and I write bot requests!! The only rule is that I don't do strictly nsfw stuff, there always will be a second first message that won't push into this territory. That's just strictly for everyone to enjoy the bot I made, but I don't think that this should be much big of an issue!
creator: _Shrimp___
